comment.value: No CA, Data, SPD, or Connector signals allowed
Topology: simplified star (schematic); fly-by enforced at layout
Assumptions: - SMBus pull-ups for SPD_SCL and SPD_SDA are provided by host platform. - WP is tied low (writes enabled) for OMI v1 development. - SA0/SA1/SA2 are slot/address straps (host-side).
